label: iCalendar feed
notes: A read-only RFC 5545 (.ics) file of the signed-in user's OPEN, due-dated work — task due dates (and, later, milestones/deadlines) as VEVENTs — to import into Google/Outlook/Apple Calendar. Session-authenticated: the read runs as the caller through the broker seam with their own scope + backend credential, so it never exposes another user's data (which is why it's a user-action export, not an unauthenticated subscription URL). `?scope=all` widens it from the caller's own tasks to every dated task in their scope.
